wiki.summary: “OLD TECHNOLOGY” is the fifth single and the fourth track on American singer-songwriter Slayyyter’s third full-length studio album “WOR$T GIRL IN AMERICA”. First teased on Tumblr with some lyrics on March 28th, 2024. It was then released on February 25th, 2026. Follows the fourth single, “DANCE…” The song serves as the final single of Slayyyter’s highly anticipated new album and is described as an “Intense, hard-punching anthem” that nails the essence of her self-proclaimed ‘iPod music’ era Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “OLD TECHNOLOGY” is the fifth single and the fourth track on American singer-songwriter Slayyyter’s third full-length studio album “WOR$T GIRL IN AMERICA”. First teased on Tumblr with some lyrics on March 28th, 2024. It was then released on February 25th, 2026. Follows the fourth single, “DANCE…” The song serves as the final single of Slayyyter’s highly anticipated new album and is described as an “Intense, hard-punching anthem” that nails the essence of her self-proclaimed ‘iPod music’ era, pairing with an official music video directed by Slayyyter herself Read more on Last.fm.
